results.gold_sparql:
SELECT ?study_section_name (COUNT(DISTINCT ?project) AS ?project_count) FROM <https://omnix.dev/graphs/demo-tenant/kg/holdout-v2-nih-reporter-non-clinical> WHERE {
  ?study_section <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-nih-reporter-non-clinical/type/StudySection> .
  ?study_section <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-nih-reporter-non-clinical/pred/study_section_name> ?study_section_name .
  ?project <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#type> <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-nih-reporter-non-clinical/type/Project> .
  ?project <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-nih-reporter-non-clinical/pred/reviewed_by> ?study_section .
  ?project <https://omnix.dev/holdout-v2/holdout-v2-nih-reporter-non-clinical/pred/fiscal_year> "2022" .
} GROUP BY ?study_section_name
ORDER BY DESC(?project_count)

schema:
-- SQLite database schema

-- Table Project: 5287 rows (from Project.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Project" (
  "project_num" TEXT,
  "project_title" TEXT,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER,
  "award_amount" INTEGER,
  "project_start_date" TEXT,
  "project_end_date" TEXT,
  "agency_code" TEXT,
  "investigator_id" TEXT,
  "institution_id" TEXT,
  "study_section_id" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Project:
--   project_num='1F32DK132864-01', project_title='Elucidating novel molecular mechanisms o', fiscal_year='2022', award_amount='67582', project_start_date='2022-05-01', project_end_date='2025-04-30', agency_code='DK', investigator_id='b394b519efee', institution_id='a6521f9d3c0c', study_section_id='8e2ee36db728'
--   project_num='5R01DK128187-02', project_title='Metformin in Pregnancy: Fetal Consequenc', fiscal_year='2022', award_amount='1457012', project_start_date='2021-09-17', project_end_date='2026-07-31', agency_code='DK', investigator_id='9fae62809768', institution_id='e4373c4d3faa', study_section_id='51fa610da6a1'

-- Table Investigator: 2513 rows (from Investigator.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Investigator" (
  "investigator_id" TEXT,
  "investigator_name" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Investigator:
--   investigator_id='b394b519efee', investigator_name='A, MU'
--   investigator_id='9fae62809768', investigator_name='AAGAARD, KJERSTI MARIE'

-- Table Institution: 643 rows (from Institution.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Institution" (
  "institution_id" TEXT,
  "org_name" TEXT,
  "org_city" TEXT,
  "org_state" TEXT,
  "org_country" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Institution:
--   institution_id='a6521f9d3c0c', org_name='DANA-FARBER CANCER INST', org_city='BOSTON', org_state='MA', org_country='UNITED STATES'
--   institution_id='e4373c4d3faa', org_name='BAYLOR COLLEGE OF MEDICINE', org_city='HOUSTON', org_state='TX', org_country='UNITED STATES'

-- Table StudySection: 1873 rows (from StudySection.csv)
CREATE TABLE "StudySection" (
  "study_section_id" TEXT,
  "study_section_name" TEXT,
  "srg_code" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from StudySection:
--   study_section_id='8e2ee36db728', study_section_name='Special Emphasis Panel[ZDK1 GRB-2 (J1)]', srg_code='ZDK1'
--   study_section_id='51fa610da6a1', study_section_name='Pathophysiology of Obesity and Metabolic', srg_code='POMD'

-- Table Agency: 36 rows (from Agency.csv)
CREATE TABLE "Agency" (
  "agency_code" TEXT,
  "agency_name" TEXT,
  "agency_abbreviation" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from Agency:
--   agency_code='DK', agency_name='National Institute of Diabetes and Diges', agency_abbreviation='NIDDK'
--   agency_code='EY', agency_name='National Eye Institute', agency_abbreviation='NEI'

-- Table State: 52 rows (from State.csv)
CREATE TABLE "State" (
  "state_code" TEXT
);
-- sample rows from State:
--   state_code='MA'
--   state_code='TX'

-- Foreign key hints (join on these):
--   Institution.institution_id -> State.org_state
--   Project.project_num -> Agency.agency_code
--   Project.project_num -> Institution.institution_id
--   Project.project_num -> Investigator.investigator_id
--   Project.project_num -> StudySection.study_section_id
